Example Decks::Pharmacology Basics.E$[hvf$K97: {{c1::First-pass metabolism}} is the liver's breakdown of an oral drug before it reaches the bloodstream, which is one reason an oral dose is often {{c2::larger}} than the equivalent intravenous dose.
